why_this_action.summary: The current short review window blocks another truthful outbound send, but the shared publisher-contact artifacts still contained malformed social-share links and escaped duplicates that would degrade the next Codeberg-first manual-contact slot.
shared_findings_used: distribution_lane_latest.json: primary_repo_flat_contact_handoff_packet is the active lane, but another live outbound action now would blur measurement
marketing_execution_board_latest.md: no truthful do-now packet exists before the short-window release
primary_repo_flat_contact_discovery_latest.json: TIMEWELL/NxCode publisher-contact artifacts were the active reusable lane
adoption_metrics_latest.json: Codeberg remains flat and is still the primary success gate
repair_scope: strip escaped backslash junk from normalized URLs
drop social share/intents from extracted contact channels
regenerate the canonical discovery and handoff packet artifacts so the scheduled post-hold rerun inherits clean channels
